title: TermRelationMetadata
description: Metadata persisted with a glossary term relationship edge.

relationshipTypeId.description: Stable identifier of the governed relationship type.

sourceTermId.description: Authored source term, independent of canonical physical row ordering.

relationType.description: Type of the semantic relation between the glossary terms.

status.description: Approval status of this relation edge.

createdBy.description: User who first authored or imported the relationship.

createdAt.description: Time the relationship was first persisted.
